summary: Matched a small batch of stage/ground functions across Castle, Fourside, and Mute City, promoted several anonymous fn_* symbols to stage-prefixed names, and tightened headers/ground variable structs to expose the types needed for those matches. The PR also refined ifhazard dynamic model helper signatures from void* to DynamicModelDesc*. There were no PR body comments or review comments in the provided slice, so intent is inferred from the diff.
what_changed: Renamed matched stage-local symbols in config/GALE01/symbols.txt from generic fn_* names to stage-prefixed names: grCastle_801CD610, grCastle_801CD9B4, grCastle_801CF750, grCastle_801D0520, grCastle_801D09B8, grMuteCity_801F1A0C, and grFourside_801F30A0.
Implemented grCastle_801CD610 as a Ground_GObj callback that calls ftCo_800C06E8(gobj, 6, grCastle_801D09B8), then grCastle_801CF7B0(gobj), then grCastle_801CDFD8(gobj).
Implemented grCastle_801CD9B4 by retrieving Ground with GET_GROUND and registering grCastle_801CF750 through mpJointSetCb1 for joints 4 and 5.

Implemented grCastle_801CDF54(Vec3*) as a Castle helper that, only when stage_info.internal_stage_id == 0x2, searches ground objects 8 through 16, extracts JObj 0, writes a world position via lb_8000B1CC, and returns whether a position was found.
Implemented grCastle_801D0520(Ground_GObj*, int) as a render-pass wrapper that calls grDisplay_801C5DB0 only when gp->gv.castle.xC8 == 0.

Implemented grFourside_801F30A0(void*, void*, void*) using M2C_FIELD on offset 0x34 of the third argument, extracting ((val >> 3) & 0xF), and incrementing gp->gv.fourside.x8 on ground object 5 when the extracted value is 1.

Implemented grFourside_801F3C40 to hide the JObj, set ground flags, initialize Fourside ground vars, and compute a randomized timer/value from grFs_804D69D8->x0 plus optional HSD_Randi(grFs_804D69D8->x4).

Implemented grMuteCity_801EFC6C stage initialization: loads grMc_804D69D0 from Ground_801C49F8, clears stage_info.unk8C bits b4 and b5, creates/initializes ground with grMuteCity_801EFD0C, calls Ground_801C39C0 and Ground_801C3BB4, registers a dynamic model with un_802FD8C4(grMuteCity_801F28A8()), and calls un_802FD65C.
Implemented grMuteCity_801F1A0C as a small wrapper around Ground_801C53EC(0x5CC60).
Updated grcastle.h, grfourside.h, and grmutecity.h prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS or fn_* to typed signatures where evidence from the matched code supported it.
Added grCastle_GroundVars to the Ground gv union with xC4 and xC8 fields, added x8 to grFourside_GroundVars, and corrected comments/offset annotations for Pura ground vars.
Changed un_802FD8A0 and un_802FD8C4 signatures in ifhazard.c/.h from void* to DynamicModelDesc*, matching their use through un_802FD708 and the Mute City dynamic model registration.
smart_moves: Used stage-prefixed symbol names once functions were matched, keeping symbols.txt, C definitions, and headers aligned instead of leaving matched functions under generic fn_* names.
Introduced narrowly scoped ground variable structs/fields only where the new matches needed them, such as grCastle_GroundVars.xC8 and grFourside_GroundVars.x8.
Replaced placeholder-style prototypes with concrete callback signatures, which made call sites such as mpJointSetCb1 and grDisplay_801C5DB0 type-check against more accurate declarations.
Typed ifhazard dynamic model wrappers as DynamicModelDesc* rather than void*, enabling grMuteCity_801EFC6C to call un_802FD8C4(grMuteCity_801F28A8()) without obscuring the data flow.
Used M2C_FIELD and PAD_STACK in grFourside_801F30A0, suggesting a pragmatic partial-match tactic for a callback argument layout that was not yet fully typed.
decomp_lessons: For stage files, once a function is matched, propagate the stage prefix through symbols.txt, headers, and C comments to avoid stale fn_* names.
Small stage matches often depend on improving the Ground union: adding a precise gv sub-struct can unlock cleaner code and remove raw offsets.
Callback signatures can often be recovered from registration functions. Here, mpJointSetCb1 informed the grCastle_801CF750 prototype, and render/display call sites informed grCastle_801D0520.
When a callback payload type is still unknown, M2C_FIELD can preserve the exact byte/bit extraction pattern while limiting the amount of invented structure.
Dynamic model APIs should be typed consistently across wrapper functions and callers; replacing void* with DynamicModelDesc* clarified Mute City hazard setup.

Include cleanup can be part of matching work: this PR removed broad placeholder/platform includes in grcastle.c and added specific dependencies such as ftdevice, grdisplay, mplib, psstructs, random, and ifhazard where required.
naming_conventions: Matched ground/stage functions use the module prefix plus address pattern, e.g. grCastle_801CD610, grMuteCity_801F1A0C, and grFourside_801F30A0.
Generic fn_801xxxxx names remain only where the function is still not identified or not matched in this slice; matched functions are promoted away from fn_*.
Stage-local globals follow the existing two-letter stage abbreviation style, such as grCs_803B7F28, grFs_804D69D8, and grMc_804D69D0.
Ground variable structs are named by stage/module with a _GroundVars suffix, e.g. grCastle_GroundVars and grFourside_GroundVars.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used PAD_STACK(20) in grFourside_801F30A0, indicating stack-shape preservation was needed for the match.
Used M2C_FIELD(r5, u8*, 0x34) to read a byte from an otherwise untyped callback argument, then matched bit extraction with ((val >> 3) & 0xF).

Matched simple wrapper/thunk-like functions by preserving exact constants and call order, such as Ground_801C53EC(0x5CC60) in grMuteCity_801F1A0C and the ordered setup sequence in grMuteCity_801EFC6C.
Preserved explicit loop initialization and increment form in grCastle_801CDF54 while searching ground objects 8 through 16, likely to maintain codegen.
Moved from raw UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to typed prototypes only where the implementation or call site evidence supported the types.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that fully type grFourside_801F30A0 callback argument instead of using M2C_FIELD.
Find later PRs that match grCastle_801CF750 or grCastle_801D09B8 after this rename.
Find PRs modifying grCastle_GroundVars fields xC4/xC8 for more descriptive names.
Find PRs that further type grMuteCity_801F28A8 and DynamicModelDesc hazard setup.
Find PRs replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS in grCastle_801CDFD8, grCastle_801CF868, or grMuteCity_801F1A34.
